name: Bifold Wallet
description: Complete workflow for cutting, skiving, and stitching a simple bifold leather wallet with two card pockets.

steps.name: Transfer and cut
steps.notes: Transfer pattern to flesh side of leather. Cut outer panel and two card pocket pieces.

steps.name: Skive edges
steps.notes: Skive the top edge of each card pocket to reduce bulk before stitching.

steps.name: Stitch card pockets
steps.notes: Saddle-stitch each card pocket to the outer panel before folding.

steps.name: Assemble and stitch perimeter
steps.notes: Fold outer panel in half and saddle-stitch the three open sides.

steps.name: Finish edges
steps.notes: Bevel edges, apply edge paint or gum tragacanth, and burnish.
